    tumor_number (bool): True if the number of tumors is greater than 1, False otherwise.
    carcinoembryonic_antigen (bool): True if the carcinoembryonic antigen level is greater than 200, False otherwise.
    node_positive (bool): True if the primary lesion is node-positive, False otherwise.

    Returns:
    int: The computed CRS.
    """
    return disease_free_interval + tumor_size + tumor_number + carcinoembryonic_antigen + node_positive
15036190.purpose: This calculator is used to determine the yield of PET scans in patients with colorectal hepatic metastases based on their clinical risk score (CRS).
15036190.eligibility: Patients with colorectal liver metastases who are considering undergoing a PET scan.
15036190.interpretation:
- CRS of 0: No patient had extrahepatic disease detected by PET and 57% had false positive readings.
- CRS of 1 or more: 14% were found to have additional disease that was detected only by PET, and there were no false positive readings.
15036190.utility: The CRS was found to be significantly correlated with the yield of PET scans in patients with colorectal hepatic metastases (P<0.001, Fisher's exact test).

15082268.title: Modified EuroSCORE for Thoracic Aortic Surgery
15082268.code:
def calculate_modified_euroscore(aortic_dissection, preoperative_malperfusion, original_euroscore):
    """
    Calculate the modified EuroSCORE for thoracic aortic surgery.

    Parameters:
    aortic_dissection (bool): True if the patient has aortic dissection, False otherwise.
    preoperative_malperfusion (bool): True if the patient has preoperative malperfusion, False otherwise.
    original_euroscore (float): The original EuroSCORE of the patient.

    Returns:
    float: The modified EuroSCORE.
    """
    score = original_euroscore
    if aortic_dissection:
        score += 6
    if preoperative_malperfusion:
        score += 12
    return score
15082268.purpose: This calculator is used to predict the mortality risk in patients undergoing thoracic aortic surgery.
15082268.eligibility: Patients who are undergoing surgery of the thoracic aorta are eligible.
15082268.interpretation:
- 3-6% risk: 1% predicted mortality
- 7-8% risk: 8.2% predicted mortality
- 9-14% risk: 12.1% predicted mortality
- 15-24% risk: 18.6% predicted mortality
- >24% risk: 28.6% predicted mortality
15082268.utility: The area under the ROC-curve was 0.91 for the modified EuroSCORE, significantly improving the predictive value of the original EuroSCORE (0.68).

15271117.title: Deep Vein Thrombosis Risk Score for Geriatric Inpatients
15271117.code:
def compute_dvt_risk_score(mobility, age, history_dvt_pe, acute_heart_failure, chronic_edema, paresis_paralysis):
    """
    Compute the DVT risk score for a geriatric inpatient.

    Parameters:
    mobility (str): 'limited' for limited mobility without immobilization, 'bedridden' for bedridden during <15 days
    age (int): patient's age
    history_dvt_pe (bool): whether the patient has a history of DVT or pulmonary embolism
    acute_heart_failure (bool): whether the patient has acute heart failure
    chronic_edema (bool): whether the patient has chronic edema of the lower limbs
    paresis_paralysis (bool): whether the patient has paresis or paralysis of a lower limb

    Returns:
    float: the DVT risk score
    """
    score = 0
    if mobility == 'limited':
        score += 1.73
    elif mobility == 'bedridden':
        score += 5.64
    if age >= 75:
        score += 1.5 * ((age - 65) // 10)
    if history_dvt_pe:
        score += 3.38
    if acute_heart_failure:
        score += 2.52
    if chronic_edema:
        score += 2.51
    if paresis_paralysis:
        score += 2.06
    return score
15271117.purpose: This calculator is used to identify the risk of symptomatic deep vein thrombosis (DVT) in geriatric inpatients.
15271117.eligibility: Patients aged 65 and older who are inpatients in geriatric departments.
15271117.interpretation: - A score of 8 or higher corresponds to an 88.7% probability of having symptomatic DVT.
15271117.utility: The clinical utility of this risk score is not provided in the article.

15312862.title: Coronary Artery Bypass Graft (CABG) Risk Score Calculator
15312862.code:
def compute_risk_score(prior_cabg, elevated_troponin, prior_stable_angina, st_segment_deviation, male_gender, peripheral_arterial_disease):
    """
    Compute the CABG risk score based on six variables.

    Args:
    prior_cabg (bool): True if the patient has a history of prior CABG, False otherwise.
    elevated_troponin (bool): True if the patient has elevated troponin, False otherwise.
    prior_stable_angina (bool): True if the patient has a history of prior stable angina, False otherwise.
    st_segment_deviation (bool): True if the patient has ST-segment deviation >=0.5 mm, False otherwise.
    male_gender (bool): True if the patient is male, False otherwise.
    peripheral_arterial_disease (bool): True if the patient has a history of peripheral arterial disease, False otherwise.

    Returns:
    float: The computed CABG risk score.
    """
    score = 0
    if prior_cabg:
        score -= 0.34
    if elevated_troponin:
        score += 3.9
    if prior_stable_angina:
        score += 1.8
    if st_segment_deviation:
        score += 1.7
    if male_gender:
        score += 1.6
    if peripheral_arterial_disease:
        score += 1.6
    return score
15312862.purpose: This calculator is used to estimate the likelihood of in-hospital coronary artery bypass graft surgery (CABG) among patients with unstable angina (UA) and non-ST-segment elevation myocardial infarction (NSTEMI).
15312862.eligibility: Patients with unstable angina (UA) and non-ST-segment elevation myocardial infarction (NSTEMI) are eligible.
15312862.interpretation:
- Risk score <3.0: 6.2% likelihood of CABG
- Risk score 3.0 to 5.0: 21.9% likelihood of CABG
- Risk score >5.0: 54.6% likelihood of CABG
15312862.utility: The association of the risk score with CABG was highly significant (p < 0.0001, c-statistic 0.72). The association remained significant in the validation cohorts from TIMI-11B trial and TIMI-III registry.

15476482.title: Risk Factor Scaling Score (RFSS) for ECMO-Supported Patients
15476482.code:
def compute_rfss(lung_dysfunction, systemic_infection, peak_lactate, kidney_dysfunction, creatine_kinase):
    """
    Compute the Risk Factor Scaling Score (RFSS) for ECMO-Supported Patients.

    Parameters:
    lung_dysfunction (bool): True if the patient has lung dysfunction, False otherwise.
    systemic_infection (bool): True if the patient has a systemic infection, False otherwise.
    peak_lactate (float): The patient's peak lactate level in mmole/L.
    kidney_dysfunction (bool): True if the patient has kidney dysfunction, False otherwise.
    creatine_kinase (float): The patient's creatine kinase level in U/L.

    Returns:
    int: The computed RFSS.
    """
    return (lung_dysfunction * 7) + (systemic_infection * 3) + ((peak_lactate > 3) * 3) + (kidney_dysfunction * 2) + ((creatine_kinase > 10000) * 1)
15476482.purpose: This calculator is used to predict which patients supported by extracorporeal membrane oxygenation (ECMO) are suitable candidates for ventricular assist device (VAD) implantation or heart transplantation (HTx).
15476482.eligibility: Patients who have been supported with ECMO for more than 48 hours due to cardiac origin are eligible.
15476482.interpretation:
- RFSS < 7: The patient is likely to have a favorable outcome and may be a suitable candidate for VAD implantation or HTx.
- RFSS >= 7: The patient is likely to have a poor outcome and may not be a suitable candidate for VAD implantation or HTx.
15476482.utility: The RFSS was validated by another group of 30 patients with good correlation.

15481055.title: Hyper-CVAD Risk Score Calculator for Adult Acute Lymphocytic Leukemia (ALL)
15481055.code:
def compute_risk_score(age, leukocytosis, performance_status, ph_positive, morphology, courses_to_CR, marrow_blasts):
    """
    Compute the risk score based on the presence of seven adverse factors.
    
    Parameters:
    age (int): Age of the patient.
    leukocytosis (float): Leukocyte count in 10(9)/L.
    performance_status (int): Eastern Cooperative Oncology Group score.
    ph_positive (bool): Whether the patient has Philadelphia chromosome-positive disease.
    morphology (str): French-American-British morphology of the disease.
    courses_to_CR (int): Number of courses to achieve complete response.
    marrow_blasts (float): Percentage of bone marrow blasts on Day 14.
    
    Returns:
    risk_score (int): The computed risk score.
    """
    risk_score = 0
    if age >= 45:
        risk_score += 1
    if leukocytosis >= 50:
        risk_score += 1
    if performance_status in [3, 4]:
        risk_score += 1
    if ph_positive:
        risk_score += 1
    if morphology == 'L2':
        risk_score += 1
    if courses_to_CR > 1:
        risk_score += 1
    if marrow_blasts > 5:
        risk_score += 1
    return risk_score
15481055.purpose: This calculator is used to determine the risk score for patients with adult acute lymphocytic leukemia (ALL) undergoing Hyper-CVAD chemotherapy. The risk score helps in predicting the 5-year complete response (CR) duration rates.
15481055.eligibility: Patients diagnosed with adult acute lymphocytic leukemia (ALL) and are undergoing or planning to undergo Hyper-CVAD chemotherapy.
15481055.interpretation:
- Risk Score 0-1: Low-risk group with a 5-year CR duration rate of 52%.
- Risk Score 2-3: Intermediate-risk group with a 5-year CR duration rate of 37%.
- Risk Score ≥ 4: Poor-risk group with a 5-year CR duration rate of 10%.
15481055.utility: The risk score calculator was derived from a study of 288 patients and was able to stratify patients into low, intermediate, and high-risk groups with significantly different 5-year CR duration rates.

15482555.title: Functional Morbidity Index for Mortality Prediction in Community-Dwelling Elders
15482555.code:
def compute_risk_score(gender, age, bathing, shopping, walking, pushing):
    """
    Compute the risk score based on the given parameters.

    Parameters:
    gender (str): 'male' or 'female'
    age (int): age of the patient
    bathing (bool): True if the patient is dependent in bathing, False otherwise
    shopping (bool): True if the patient is dependent in shopping, False otherwise
    walking (bool): True if the patient has difficulty walking several blocks, False otherwise
    pushing (bool): True if the patient has difficulty pulling or pushing heavy objects, False otherwise

    Returns:
    int: the computed risk score
    """
    score = 0
    if gender == 'male':
        score += 2
    if age >= 76 and age <= 80:
        score += 1
    elif age > 80:
        score += 2
    if bathing:
        score += 1
    if shopping:
        score += 2
    if walking:
        score += 2
    if pushing:
        score += 1
    return score
15482555.purpose: This calculator is used to predict the 2-year mortality risk in community-dwelling elders based on self-reported functional status, age, and gender.
15482555.eligibility: Patients who are community-dwelling elders aged 70 or above.
15482555.interpretation:
- 0 to 2 points: Low risk group with a 2-year mortality risk of 3-5%
- 3 to 6 points: Medium risk group with a 2-year mortality risk of 11-12%
- Over 7 points: High risk group with a 2-year mortality risk of 34-36%
15482555.utility: The c-statistics for the point system were 0.76 and 0.74 in the development and validation cohorts, respectively, indicating a good predictive accuracy.

15531752.title: Risk of Infection to Severe Sepsis and Shock Score (RISSS)
15531752.code:
def compute_risss(temp, hr, bp, platelets, sodium, bilirubin, ventilation, pneumonia, peritonitis, bacteremia, cocci, bacilli):
    """
    Compute the Risk of Infection to Severe Sepsis and Shock Score (RISSS).
    
    Parameters:
    temp (bool): True if temperature > 38.2 degrees C, False otherwise.
    hr (bool): True if heart rate > 120/minute, False otherwise.
    bp (bool): True if systolic blood pressure > 110 mm Hg, False otherwise.
    platelets (bool): True if platelets > 150 x 109/L, False otherwise.
    sodium (bool): True if serum sodium > 145 mmol/L, False otherwise.
    bilirubin (bool): True if bilirubin > 30 mumol/L, False otherwise.
    ventilation (bool): True if the patient is on mechanical ventilation, False otherwise.
    pneumonia (bool): True if the patient has pneumonia, False otherwise.
    peritonitis (bool): True if the patient has peritonitis, False otherwise.
    bacteremia (bool): True if the patient has primary bacteremia, False otherwise.
    cocci (bool): True if the patient has an infection with gram-positive cocci, False otherwise.
    bacilli (bool): True if the patient has an infection with aerobic gram-negative bacilli, False otherwise.
    
    Returns:
    float: The RISSS score.
    """
    weights = [1.6, 1.3, 1.5, 1.5, 1.5, 1.3, 1.5, 1.5, 1.5, 1.8, 1.3, 1.4]
    variables = [temp, hr, bp, platelets, sodium, bilirubin, ventilation, pneumonia, peritonitis, bacteremia, cocci, bacilli]
    score = sum(w * v for w, v in zip(weights, variables))
    return score
15531752.purpose: This calculator is used to estimate the risk of progression from infection to severe sepsis or shock in critically ill patients.
15531752.eligibility: Patients admitted to intensive care units with a first episode of infection.
15531752.interpretation:
- Score 0-8: Low risk (9% probability of worsening to severe sepsis or shock)
- Score 8.5-16: Moderate risk (17% probability)
- Score 16.5-24: High risk (31% probability)
- Score > 24: Very high risk (55% probability)
15531752.utility: The RISSS score was found to be a reliable predictor of progression to severe sepsis or shock in a cohort of 1531 patients, with a cumulative incidence of 20% and 24% at Days 10 and 30, respectively.

15562045.title: Postoperative Vomiting in Children Risk Score (POVOC-score)
15562045.code:
def compute_POVOC_score(duration, age, surgery_type, history):
    """
    Compute the POVOC score based on the four risk factors.

    Args:
    duration (int): Duration of surgery in minutes.
    age (int): Age of the patient in years.
    surgery_type (str): Type of surgery. 'strabismus' for strabismus surgery, others for other types.
    history (bool): Whether there is a history of PV in the child or relatives.

    Returns:
    int: The POVOC score.
    """
    score = 0
    if duration >= 30:
        score += 1
    if age >= 3:
        score += 1
    if surgery_type == 'strabismus':
        score += 1
    if history:
        score += 1
    return score
15562045.purpose: This calculator is used to predict the probability of postoperative vomiting (PV) in pediatric patients undergoing various types of surgery under general anesthesia without antiemetic prophylaxis.
15562045.eligibility: Pediatric patients aged 0-14 years undergoing various types of surgery under general anesthesia without antiemetic prophylaxis are eligible.
15562045.interpretation:
- 0 risk factors: 9% incidence of PV
- 1 risk factor: 10% incidence of PV
- 2 risk factors: 30% incidence of PV
- 3 risk factors: 55% incidence of PV
- 4 risk factors: 70% incidence of PV
15562045.utility: The area under the receiver operating characteristic curve was 0.72 (95% confidence interval: 0.68-0.77), suggesting that PV can be predicted with an acceptable accuracy using this four-item simplified risk score.

15569993.title: Medulloblastoma Survival Prediction Calculator
15569993.code:
import numpy as np

def calculate_risk_score(metastatic_disease, p53, trkc, erbb2):
    """
    Calculate the risk score for a patient with medulloblastoma.

    Parameters:
    metastatic_disease (bool): Presence of metastatic disease at presentation.
    p53 (bool): p53 immunopositivity.
    trkc (bool): TrkC immunopositivity.
    erbb2 (bool): ErbB2 immunopositivity.

    Returns:
    float: The risk score.
    """
    # Convert boolean values to integers
    metastatic_disease = int(metastatic_disease)
    p53 = int(p53)
    trkc = int(trkc)
    erbb2 = int(erbb2)

    # Calculate the risk score
    risk_score = np.log(2.02) * metastatic_disease + np.log(2.29) * p53 + np.log(0.65) * trkc + np.log(1.51) * erbb2

    return risk_score
15569993.purpose: This calculator is used to predict the survival rate of patients with medulloblastoma based on clinical and biological markers.
15569993.eligibility: Patients who have undergone surgery for medulloblastoma are eligible.
15569993.interpretation:
- Patients at the 10th percentile of the score distribution have a 5-year survival rate of 80.0% with radiation therapy and 70.5% without radiation therapy.
- Patients at the 50th percentile of the score distribution have a 5-year survival rate of 71.0% with radiation therapy and 58.5% without radiation therapy.
- Patients at the 90th percentile of the score distribution have a 5-year survival rate of 35.7% with radiation therapy and 20.0% without radiation therapy.
15569993.utility: The calculator provides further prognostic information than can be obtained when either clinical factors or biological markers are studied separately. It establishes a framework for comparing prognostic markers in future clinical studies.

15611458.title: Clinical Risk Score (CRS) Calculator for Colorectal Metastasis
15611458.code:
def compute_crs(lymph_node_positive, disease_free_interval, hepatic_tumor_count, hepatic_tumor_size, cea_level):
    """
    Compute the Clinical Risk Score (CRS) for a patient.

    Parameters:
    lymph_node_positive (bool): Whether the primary tumor is lymph node-positive.
    disease_free_interval (int): The disease-free interval in months.
    hepatic_tumor_count (int): The number of hepatic tumors.
    hepatic_tumor_size (float): The size of the hepatic tumor in cm.
    cea_level (float): The level of cardio embryonic antigen in ng/mL.

    Returns:
    int: The CRS of the patient.
    """
    return int(lymph_node_positive) + int(disease_free_interval < 12) + int(hepatic_tumor_count > 1) + int(hepatic_tumor_size > 5) + int(cea_level < 200)
15611458.purpose: This calculator is used to determine the likelihood of identifying radiographically occult unresectable disease in patients with colorectal metastasis, and to guide the decision on whether to perform diagnostic laparoscopy prior to planned hepatic resection.
15611458.eligibility: Patients who are planned for partial hepatic resection for colorectal metastases or prior to hepatic artery infusion pump placement for colorectal metastases.
15611458.interpretation:
- CRS of 0 or 1: 4% likelihood of identifying radiographically occult unresectable disease
- CRS of 2 or 3: 21% likelihood
- CRS of 4 or 5: 38% likelihood
15611458.utility: The CRS correlated closely with the likelihood of identifying radiographically occult unresectable disease. Preventing an unnecessary celiotomy with laparoscopy was associated with a decreased length of hospital stay and earlier initiation of chemotherapy.

15641036.title: M. D. Anderson Prognostic Index (MDAPI)
15641036.code:
def compute_mdapi(n2_n3_disease, residual_tumor_size, multifocal_residual_disease, lymphovascular_invasion):
    """
    Compute the M. D. Anderson Prognostic Index (MDAPI) score.

    Parameters:
    n2_n3_disease (bool): True if the patient has clinical N2 or N3 disease, False otherwise.
    residual_tumor_size (bool): True if the residual pathologic tumor size > 2 cm, False otherwise.
    multifocal_residual_disease (bool): True if the patient has a multifocal pattern of residual disease, False otherwise.
    lymphovascular_invasion (bool): True if lymphovascular space invasion is present in the specimen, False otherwise.

    Returns:
    int: The MDAPI score, ranging from 0 to 4.
    """
    return int(n2_n3_disease) + int(residual_tumor_size) + int(multifocal_residual_disease) + int(lymphovascular_invasion)
15641036.purpose: This calculator is used to determine the risk of ipsilateral breast tumor recurrence (IBTR) and locoregional recurrence (LRR) after neoadjuvant chemotherapy and breast-conserving therapy (BCT).
15641036.eligibility: Patients who have undergone neoadjuvant chemotherapy and are considering breast-conserving therapy (BCT) are eligible.
15641036.interpretation:
- MDAPI score 0 or 1: Low risk group. 5-year IBTR-free survival rates are 97%. 5-year LRR-free survival rates are 94%.
- MDAPI score 2: Intermediate risk group. 5-year IBTR-free survival rates are 88%. 5-year LRR-free survival rates are 83%.
- MDAPI score 3 or 4: High risk group. 5-year IBTR-free survival rates are 82%. 5-year LRR-free survival rates are 58%.
15641036.utility: The MDAPI stratified the 340 patients into 3 subsets with statistically different levels of risk for IBTR and LRR after neoadjuvant chemotherapy and BCT.

15643200.title: Extraprostatic Extension (EPE) in the Neurovascular Bundle (NVB) Risk Calculator
15643200.code:
def compute_risk_score(PSA, Gleason_score, DRE, percent_cores_with_tumor, percent_involvement):
    """
    Compute the risk score for EPE in the NVB.

    Parameters:
    PSA (float): Prostate specific antigen level. High risk if 10 or greater.
    Gleason_score (int): Biopsy Gleason score. High risk if 7 or greater.
    DRE (str): Digital rectal examination result. High risk if abnormal.
    percent_cores_with_tumor (float): Percent of side specific cores with tumor. High risk if greater than 33.3%.
    percent_involvement (float): Average percent involvement of each positive core. High risk if greater than 20%.

    Returns:
    int: The risk score, ranging from 0 to 5.
    """
    risk_score = 0
    if PSA >= 10:
        risk_score += 1
    if Gleason_score >= 7:
        risk_score += 1
    if DRE == 'abnormal':
        risk_score += 1
    if percent_cores_with_tumor > 33.3:
        risk_score += 1
    if percent_involvement > 20:
        risk_score += 1
    return risk_score
15643200.purpose: This calculator is used to predict the risk of extraprostatic extension (EPE) in the neurovascular bundle (NVB) in patients with clinically localized prostate cancer.
15643200.eligibility: Patients with clinically localized prostate cancer who are being considered for radical retropubic prostatectomy without preoperative adjuvant therapy.
15643200.interpretation:
- 0-1: The probability of EPE in the NVB is less than 10%.
- 2-5: The probability of EPE in the NVB is 10% or greater.
15643200.utility: The model generated in this study allows for the preoperative identification of patients with 10% or greater probability of EPE in the NVB. This can aid in the decision to spare the NVB safely.

15678041.title: Long-Term Survival Prediction After Coronary Artery Bypass Grafting
15678041.code:
def compute_risk_score(age, past_CHF, PVD, emergency_operation, COPD):
    """
    Compute the risk score for long-term survival after coronary artery bypass grafting.

    Parameters:
    age (int): Age of the patient in years.
    past_CHF (bool): Whether the patient has a history of congestive heart failure.
    PVD (bool): Whether the patient has peripheral vascular disease.
    emergency_operation (bool): Whether the operation is an emergency.
    COPD (bool): Whether the patient has chronic obstructive pulmonary disease.

    Returns:
    float: The computed risk score.
    """
    score = 0.049 * age + 0.430 * past_CHF + 0.507 * PVD + 0.580 * emergency_operation + 0.366 * COPD
    return score
15678041.purpose: This calculator is used to predict long-term survival after coronary artery bypass grafting in patients with ejection fraction 25% or less.
15678041.eligibility: Patients with ejection fraction 25% or less who are undergoing coronary artery bypass grafting.
15678041.interpretation:
The 5-year survivals of the predictive score quartiles are as follows:
- Quartile 1 (lowest score): 82.3% survival
- Quartile 2: 78.2% survival
- Quartile 3: 65.5% survival
- Quartile 4 (highest score): 45.5% survival
15678041.utility: The model was validated on a separate group of patients, with 5-year survival rates of 77.4%, 71.2%, 65.8%, and 45.5% in the quartiles, respectively.

15708265.title: Spinal Cord Reirradiation Risk Calculator
15708265.code:
def calculate_risk_score(cumulative_BED, greatest_BED, interval):
    """
    Calculate the risk score for spinal cord reirradiation.

    Parameters:
    cumulative_BED (float): The cumulative biologically effective dose (BED).
    greatest_BED (float): The greatest BED for all treatment series in a particular individual.
    interval (int): The interval between treatments in months.

    Returns:
    float: The risk score.
    """
    if cumulative_BED <= 135.5 and interval >= 6 and greatest_BED <= 98:
        return 'low'
    elif cumulative_BED > 135.5 and cumulative_BED <= 150:
        return 'intermediate'
    else:
        return 'high'
15708265.purpose: This calculator is used to estimate the risk of myelopathy in patients undergoing spinal cord reirradiation.
15708265.eligibility: Patients who are undergoing or have undergone spinal cord reirradiation.
15708265.interpretation:
- Low risk: Patients are free of myelopathy.
- Intermediate risk: 33% of patients develop myelopathy.
- High risk: 90% of patients develop myelopathy.
15708265.utility: The risk score was developed based on a study of 40 patients. Further validation is needed to assess its clinical utility.

15809450.title: Classical Hodgkin's Lymphoma Prognostic Score Calculator
15809450.code:
def compute_risk_score(age, stage, bcl2_expression):
    """
    Compute the risk score for a patient with Classical Hodgkin's Lymphoma.

    Parameters:
    age (int): The age of the patient.
    stage (int): The stage of the disease (I, II, III, or IV).
    bcl2_expression (bool): Whether bcl-2 is expressed (True or False).

    Returns:
    int: The risk score for the patient.
    """
    score = 0
    if age >= 45:
        score += 1
    if stage >= 3:
        score += 1
    if bcl2_expression:
        score += 1
    return score
15809450.purpose: This calculator is used to predict the outcome of patients diagnosed with Classical Hodgkin's Lymphoma (CHL) based on age, stage of the disease, and bcl-2 expression.
15809450.eligibility: Patients diagnosed with Classical Hodgkin's Lymphoma are eligible.
15809450.interpretation:
- Score 0: Good prognosis
- Score 1: Intermediate prognosis
- Score 2-3: Poor prognosis
15809450.utility: The scoring system was found to be independently associated with both failure-free survival (FFS) and overall survival (OS) in a study of 107 patients with CHL. The study found a progressively worse FFS and OS with increasing scores (P < .001).

15846264.title: Non-ST Elevation Acute Coronary Syndrome (NSTE-ACS) Risk Score
15846264.code:
def compute_risk_score(troponin_I, myoglobin, c_reactive_protein, fibrinogen, homocysteine):
    """
    Compute the risk score based on the number of elevated biomarkers.
    
    Parameters:
    troponin_I (bool): True if elevated, False otherwise
    myoglobin (bool): True if elevated, False otherwise
    c_reactive_protein (bool): True if elevated, False otherwise
    fibrinogen (bool): True if elevated, False otherwise
    homocysteine (bool): True if elevated, False otherwise
    
    Returns:
    int: The risk score, ranging from 0 to 5
    """
    return sum([troponin_I, myoglobin, c_reactive_protein, fibrinogen, homocysteine])
15846264.purpose: This calculator is used to predict the risk of major events (death or nonfatal myocardial infarction) in patients with non-ST elevation acute coronary syndrome at 1-month and 1-year follow-up.
15846264.eligibility: Patients admitted with non-ST elevation acute coronary syndrome are eligible.
15846264.interpretation:
- Score 0: 4.1% risk at 1 month, 8.2% risk at 1 year
- Score 1: 3.7% risk at 1 month, 11.1% risk at 1 year
- Score 2: 5.7% risk at 1 month, 12.3% risk at 1 year
- Score 3: 6.1% risk at 1 month, 16.2% risk at 1 year
- Score 4: 6.5% risk at 1 month, 23.7% risk at 1 year
- Score 5: 30.8% risk at 1 month, 50% risk at 1 year
15846264.utility: The risk score showed an adjusted risk of major events of 1.6 [1.3-1.9] at first month and of 1.4 [1.2-1.7] at first year.

15855371.title: Arthroscopic Treatment Risk Calculator for Anterior Instability of the Shoulder
15855371.code:
def compute_risk_score(age, laxity, fracture, sports):
    """
    Compute the risk score for recurrence of anterior instability of the shoulder after arthroscopic treatment.

    Parameters:
    age (bool): True if the patient is younger than 28 years, False otherwise.
    laxity (bool): True if the patient has ligamentous laxity, False otherwise.
    fracture (bool): True if the patient has a fracture of the glenoid rim involving more than 15% of the articular surface, False otherwise.
    sports (bool): True if the patient participates in contact or overhead sports post-operatively, False otherwise.

    Returns:
    int: The risk score.
    """
    score = 0
    if age:
        score += 1
    if laxity:
        score += 1
    if fracture:
        score += 5
    if sports:
        score += 1
    return score
15855371.purpose: This calculator is used to identify patients at increased risk of recurrence of anterior instability of the shoulder after arthroscopic treatment.
15855371.eligibility: Patients who have undergone arthroscopic treatment for anterior instability of the shoulder.
15855371.interpretation:
- Score of 0 or 1: Low risk of recurrence. Arthroscopic treatment is likely to be successful.
- Score of 2 or more: High risk of recurrence (43%). Open surgery is recommended.
15855371.utility: The risk score was found to be significantly associated with the risk of recurrence (p < 0.001). The relative risk of recurrence for patients with a score of 2 or more was 43%.

15862409.title: CADILLAC Risk Score for Mortality After Primary Percutaneous Coronary Intervention (PCI)
15862409.code:
def calculate_cadillac_score(age, killip_class, ejection_fraction, anemia, renal_insufficiency, triple_vessel_disease, timi_flow_grade):
    """
    Calculate the CADILLAC risk score based on the input parameters.
    
    Parameters:
    age (int): Age of the patient
    killip_class (int): Killip class of the patient (2 or 3)
    ejection_fraction (float): Baseline left ventricular ejection fraction
    anemia (bool): Whether the patient has anemia
    renal_insufficiency (bool): Whether the patient has renal insufficiency
    triple_vessel_disease (bool): Whether the patient has triple-vessel disease
    timi_flow_grade (int): Post-procedural Thrombolysis In Myocardial Infarction flow grade
    
    Returns:
    int: The CADILLAC risk score
    """
    score = 0
    if age > 65:
        score += 2
    if killip_class in [2, 3]:
        score += 3
    if ejection_fraction < 40:
        score += 4
    if anemia:
        score += 2
    if renal_insufficiency:
        score += 3
    if triple_vessel_disease:
        score += 2
    if timi_flow_grade:
        score += 2
    return score
15862409.purpose: This calculator is used to predict mortality after primary PCI for acute myocardial infarction (AMI).
15862409.eligibility: Patients who have undergone primary PCI for AMI are eligible.
15862409.interpretation:
- Score 0 to 2: Low risk
- Score 3 to 5: Intermediate risk
- Score 6 or more: High risk
15862409.utility: The CADILLAC risk score has excellent prognostic accuracy for survival, with c statistics of 0.83 and 0.81 for 30-day mortality and 0.79 and 0.78 for 1-year mortality, respectively.

15872225.title: Aspergillus Fumigatus Invasive Aspergillosis (IA) Risk Calculator
15872225.code:
def compute_risk_score(invasive_procedure, multiple_samples, leukemia, neutropenia, corticosteroid_treatment):
    """
    Compute the risk score for Invasive Aspergillosis (IA).
    
    Parameters:
    invasive_procedure (bool): True if the sample was obtained by invasive procedures, False otherwise.
    multiple_samples (bool): True if there are two or more positive samples from the same patient, False otherwise.
    leukemia (bool): True if the patient has leukemia, False otherwise.
    neutropenia (bool): True if the patient has neutropenia, False otherwise.
    corticosteroid_treatment (bool): True if the patient is under corticosteroid treatment, False otherwise.
    
    Returns:
    int: The risk score for IA.
    """
    score = 0
    if invasive_procedure:
        score += 1
    if multiple_samples:
        score += 1
    if leukemia:
        score += 2
    if neutropenia:
        score += 5
    if corticosteroid_treatment:
        score += 2
    return score
15872225.purpose: This calculator is used to predict the risk of Invasive Aspergillosis (IA) in patients from whom Aspergillus Fumigatus has been isolated.
15872225.eligibility: Patients from whom Aspergillus Fumigatus has been isolated are eligible for this calculator.
15872225.interpretation:
- Score of 0: 2.5% probability of IA
- Score of 1 or 2: 10.3% probability of IA
- Score of 3 or 4: 40% probability of IA
- Score of 5 or more: 70% probability of IA
15872225.utility: The clinical utility of the risk score was not provided in the article.

15947746.title: Surgical Site Infection Risk Score Calculator
15947746.code:
def compute_risk_score(cirrhosis, other_disease, preoperative_urinary_catheter):
    """
    Compute the risk score for surgical site infection.

    Args:
    cirrhosis (bool): Whether the patient has cirrhosis.
    other_disease (bool): Whether the patient has other diseases.
    preoperative_urinary_catheter (bool): Whether the patient has a preoperative urinary catheter.

    Returns:
    float: The computed risk score.
    """
    return -4.9 + (1.5 * cirrhosis) + (other_disease) + (0.8 * preoperative_urinary_catheter)
15947746.purpose: This calculator is used to predict the risk of surgical site infections (SSI) in patients undergoing clean abdominal surgery.
15947746.eligibility: Patients who are undergoing clean abdominal surgery are eligible for this calculator.
15947746.interpretation:
- Score below -4.5: The patient is considered low-risk for SSI (S1R- group).
- Score above -4.5: The patient is considered high-risk for SSI (S1R+ group).
15947746.utility: In the S1R+ group, antibiotic prophylaxis significantly reduced the rate of SSI and of parietal infectious complications by 58% and 69%, respectively.

16009664.title: MRSA Carriage Risk Score Calculator
16009664.code:
def compute_risk_score(recent_antibiotic_treatment, intra_hospital_transfer, past_hospitalization):
    """
    Compute the MRSA Carriage Risk Score.

    Parameters:
    recent_antibiotic_treatment (bool): True if the patient has had recent antibiotic treatment, False otherwise.
    intra_hospital_transfer (bool): True if the patient has had an intra-hospital transfer, False otherwise.
    past_hospitalization (bool): True if the patient has been hospitalized in the past 2 years, False otherwise.

    Returns:
    int: The MRSA Carriage Risk Score.
    """
    return int(recent_antibiotic_treatment) + int(intra_hospital_transfer) + int(past_hospitalization)
16009664.purpose: This calculator is used to estimate the likelihood of previously unknown MRSA carriage in elderly patients upon admission to a geriatric hospital.
16009664.eligibility: Elderly patients being admitted to a geriatric hospital are eligible for this risk score calculation.
16009664.interpretation:
- 0 point: 4% prevalence of MRSA carriage
- 1 point: 15% prevalence of MRSA carriage
- 2 or more points: 31% prevalence of MRSA carriage
16009664.utility: The risk score showed good discrimination and calibration in both groups. The probability of MRSA carriage increased across risk scores.

16020586.title: Acute Chest Pain Risk Stratification Calculator
16020586.code:
def compute_risk_score(chest_pain_score, diabetes, previous_surgery, st_depression):
    """
    Compute the risk score for a patient with acute chest pain and normal troponin concentrations.

    Parameters:
    chest_pain_score (int): The patient's chest pain score. Should be >= 11 for this predictor to be considered present.
    diabetes (bool): Whether the patient has diabetes. True for present, False for absent.
    previous_surgery (bool): Whether the patient has had previous coronary surgery. True for present, False for absent.
    st_depression (bool): Whether the patient has ST segment depression. True for present, False for absent.

    Returns:
    risk_score (int): The patient's risk score, computed as the sum of the values assigned to the predictors.
    """
    risk_score = 0
    if chest_pain_score >= 11:
        risk_score += 1
    if diabetes:
        risk_score += 1
    if previous_surgery:
        risk_score += 1
    if st_depression:
        risk_score += 1
    return risk_score
16020586.purpose: This calculator is used to stratify the risk of myocardial infarction or cardiac death in patients with acute chest pain and normal troponin concentrations.
16020586.eligibility: Patients with acute chest pain and normal troponin concentrations who have been evaluated in the emergency department are eligible.
16020586.interpretation:
- 0-1 predictors: 2.7% event rate
- 2 predictors: 10.2% event rate
- 3-4 predictors: 29.2% event rate
16020586.utility: The risk score proved useful for patient stratification, with a significant difference in event rates between patients with different numbers of predictors.

16020594.title: FRISC Score for Unstable Coronary Artery Disease
16020594.code:
def compute_frisc_score(age, sex, diabetes, previous_mi, st_depression, troponins, inflammation_markers):
    """
    Compute the FRISC score for a patient with unstable CAD.

    Parameters:
    age (int): patient's age
    sex (str): patient's sex, 'male' or 'female'
    diabetes (bool): whether the patient has diabetes
    previous_mi (bool): whether the patient has had a previous MI
    st_depression (bool): whether the patient has ST depression
    troponins (bool): whether the patient has increased concentrations of troponins
    inflammation_markers (bool): whether the patient has increased markers of inflammation

    Returns:
    int: FRISC score
    """
    score = 0
    if age > 70:
        score += 1
    if sex == 'male':
        score += 1
    if diabetes:
        score += 1
    if previous_mi:
        score += 1
    if st_depression:
        score += 1
    if troponins:
        score += 1
    if inflammation_markers:
        score += 1
    return score
16020594.purpose: This calculator is used for risk stratification and selection of patients for an early invasive treatment strategy in unstable coronary artery disease (CAD).
16020594.eligibility: Patients with unstable coronary artery disease are eligible.
16020594.interpretation:
- Score 0-2: Low risk, neither death nor death/MI was reduced in patients with 0-2 risk factors.
- Score 3-4: Moderate risk, death/MI was reduced from 15.7% to 10.8% with an invasive strategy.
- Score 5-7: High risk, the invasive strategy reduced mortality from 15.4% to 5.2%.
16020594.utility: The FRISC score was found to be effective in stratifying risk in patients with unstable CAD and guiding treatment strategy. The risk ratio for mortality with an invasive strategy was 0.34 (95% CI 0.15 to 0.78) in high-risk patients and 0.69 (95% CI 0.50 to 0.94) in moderate-risk patients.

16053956.title: Acute Chest Pain Risk Score
16053956.code:
def compute_risk_score(chest_pain_score, pain_episodes, age, diabetes, angioplasty):
    """
    Compute the risk score for a patient based on the given variables.

    Parameters:
    chest_pain_score (int): The patient's chest pain score. If the score is >= 10, assign 1 point.
    pain_episodes (int): The number of pain episodes in the last 24 hours. If the number is >= 2, assign 1 point.
    age (int): The patient's age. If the age is >= 67, assign 1 point.
    diabetes (bool): Whether the patient has insulin-dependent diabetes mellitus. If true, assign 2 points.
    angioplasty (bool): Whether the patient has had prior percutaneous transluminal coronary angioplasty. If true, assign 1 point.

    Returns:
    int: The total risk score for the patient.
    """
    score = 0
    if chest_pain_score >= 10:
        score += 1
    if pain_episodes >= 2:
        score += 1
    if age >= 67:
        score += 1
    if diabetes:
        score += 2
    if angioplasty:
        score += 1
    return score
16053956.purpose: This calculator is used to assess the risk of mortality or myocardial infarction at one year in patients presenting with acute chest pain, non-ST-segment deviation ECG, and normal troponin levels.
16053956.eligibility: Patients with acute chest pain, non-ST-segment deviation on ECG, and normal troponin levels are eligible. Patients with ST-segment deviation and troponin elevation are excluded.
16053956.interpretation:
- 0 points: 0% event rate
- 1 point: 3.1% event rate
- 2 points: 5.4% event rate
- 3 points: 17.6% event rate
- >=4 points: 29.6% event rate
16053956.utility: The accuracy of the score was greater than that of the TIMI risk score for the primary (C index of 0.78 vs. 0.66, p = 0.0002) and secondary (C index of 0.70 vs. 0.66, p = 0.1) end points.

16145525.title: Prolonged Postprocedural Hypotension Risk Score After Carotid Artery Stenting
16145525.code:
def compute_risk_score(distance, stenosis_type, plaque_features, calcification):
    """
    Compute the risk score for prolonged hypotension after carotid artery stenting.

    Parameters:
    distance (bool): True if the distance from carotid bifurcation to maximum stenotic lesion is <= 10 mm, False otherwise.
    stenosis_type (bool): True if the type of stenosis is eccentric, False if it's concentric.
    plaque_features (bool): True if the plaque morphological features are echogenic, False otherwise.
    calcification (bool): True if there's calcification at carotid bifurcation, False otherwise.

    Returns:
    int: The total risk score.
    """
    score = 0
    if distance:
        score += 1
    if stenosis_type:
        score += 1
    if plaque_features:
        score += 1
    if calcification:
        score += 1
    return score
16145525.purpose: This calculator is used to predict the risk of prolonged hypotension after carotid artery stenting.
16145525.eligibility: Patients who are undergoing stent deployment for carotid stenosis are eligible.
16145525.interpretation:
- Score 0-2: Low risk of prolonged hypotension
- Score 3-4: High risk of prolonged hypotension
16145525.utility: The clinical utility of this risk score is not provided in the article.

16210706.title: Geriatric Nutritional Risk Index (GNRI)
16210706.code:
def calculate_gnri(albumin, weight, height, gender):
    """
    Calculate the Geriatric Nutritional Risk Index (GNRI)

    Parameters:
    albumin (float): Albumin levels in g/L
    weight (float): Weight in kg
    height (float): Height in cm
    gender (str): Gender, either 'male' or 'female'

    Returns:
    float: GNRI score
    """
    if gender == 'male':
        ideal_weight = height - 100 - ((height - 150) / 4)
    elif gender == 'female':
        ideal_weight = height - 100 - ((height - 150) / 2.5)
    weight_ratio = weight / ideal_weight if weight <= ideal_weight else 1
    gnri = (1.489 * albumin) + (41.7 * weight_ratio)
    return gnri
16210706.purpose: The GNRI is used to predict the risk of morbidity and mortality in hospitalized elderly patients based on their nutritional status.
16210706.eligibility: Hospitalized elderly patients are eligible for this calculator.
16210706.interpretation:
- GNRI < 82: Major nutrition-related risk. Odds ratio for mortality is 29 (95% CI: 5.2, 161.4) and for complications is 4.4 (95% CI: 1.3, 14.9).
- 82 <= GNRI < 92: Moderate nutrition-related risk. Odds ratio for mortality is 6.6 (95% CI: 1.3, 33.0) and for complications is 4.9 (95% CI: 1.9, 12.5).
- 92 <= GNRI <= 98: Low nutrition-related risk. Odds ratio for mortality is 5.6 (95% CI: 1.2, 26.6) and for complications is 3.3 (95% CI: 1.4, 8.0).
- GNRI > 98: No nutrition-related risk.
16210706.utility: The GNRI correlated with a severity score taking into account complications and 6-month mortality. It did not correlate with BMI or weight.

16243800.title: Multiple Myeloma Prognostic Score Calculator
16243800.code:
def compute_risk_score(HLA_Is_level):
    """
    Compute the risk score based on the level of HLA-Is.

    Args:
    HLA_Is_level (float): The level of HLA-Is in microg/mL.

    Returns:
    str: The risk score ('High' or 'Low').
    """
    if HLA_Is_level >= 2.1:
        return 'High'
    else:
        return 'Low'
16243800.purpose: This calculator is used to predict the survival prognosis of patients with multiple myeloma based on the levels of total soluble HLA class I (HLA-Is) and beta2-microglobulin.
16243800.eligibility: Patients with newly diagnosed multiple myeloma are eligible for this calculator.
16243800.interpretation:
- 'High': Patients with a high risk score have a short survival prognosis. The relative risk of death is higher for these patients.
- 'Low': Patients with a low risk score have a better survival prognosis. The relative risk of death is lower for these patients.
16243800.utility: The addition of HLA-Is to beta2-microglobulin produced an efficient prognostic score (P < 0.0001). This indicates that the calculator has a high clinical utility in predicting the survival prognosis of patients with multiple myeloma.

16354736.title: Essen Intracerebral Haemorrhage Score
16354736.purpose: This calculator is used to predict mortality and complete recovery in patients with acute intracerebral haemorrhage (ICH).
16354736.eligibility: Patients with acute intracerebral haemorrhage are eligible.
16354736.interpretation:
- Score < 3: Predicts complete recovery
- Score > 7: Predicts death
16354736.utility: The Essen ICH score showed a high prognostic accuracy for complete recovery and death in both the development and validation cohort. It was superior to the physicians' prognosis and to two previous prognostic scores developed for a slightly modified outcome.

16359355.title: rFVIIa Outcome Prediction Score
16359355.code:
def compute_score(coagulopathy, renal_impairment, hypothermia, red_cell_transfusion, advanced_age, obstetric_indication):
    """
    Compute the rFVIIa Outcome Prediction Score.

    Parameters:
    coagulopathy (bool): True if the patient has coagulopathy, False otherwise.
    renal_impairment (bool): True if the patient has renal impairment, False otherwise.
    hypothermia (bool): True if the patient has hypothermia, False otherwise.
    red_cell_transfusion (int): The number of red cell units transfused to the patient.
    advanced_age (bool): True if the patient is of advanced age, False otherwise.
    obstetric_indication (bool): True if the patient has an obstetric indication, False otherwise.

    Returns:
    int: The rFVIIa Outcome Prediction Score.
    """
    score = 0
    if coagulopathy:
        score += 1
    if renal_impairment:
        score += 1
    if hypothermia:
        score += 1
    if red_cell_transfusion > 10:
        score += 1
    if advanced_age:
        score += 1
    if obstetric_indication:
        score += 1
    return score
16359355.purpose: This calculator is used to predict the outcome of patients receiving recombinant activated factor VII (rFVIIa/NovoSeven) for uncontrolled surgical, traumatic or obstetric bleeding.
16359355.eligibility: Patients who have received rFVIIa for uncontrolled surgical, traumatic or obstetric bleeding are eligible.
16359355.interpretation:
- Score 0-1: Low-risk group with a survival rate of 85%
- Score 2-3: Intermediate-risk group with a survival rate of 50%
- Score 4-6: High-risk group with a survival rate of 18%
16359355.utility: The score was able to differentiate between survivors and non-survivors in a cohort of 36 patients, with survival rates varying according to the prognostic score.

16377317.title: Pancreatic Stent Occlusion Risk Calculator
16377317.code:
def compute_risk_score(diameter, length, gender, insufficiency):
    """
    Compute the risk score for major stent occlusion.

    Parameters:
    diameter (float): The diameter of the stent in French (F).
    length (float): The length of the stent in cm.
    gender (str): The gender of the patient. Either 'male' or 'female'.
    insufficiency (bool): Whether the patient has exocrine pancreatic insufficiency requiring regular oral enzyme supplementation.

    Returns:
    int: The risk score for major stent occlusion.
    """
    score = 0
    if diameter > 8.5:
        score += 3
    if length > 8:
        score += 2
    if gender == 'female':
        score += 2
    if insufficiency:
        score += 2
    return score
16377317.purpose: This calculator is used to predict the risk of major stent occlusion in patients with chronic pancreatitis who have undergone main pancreatic duct (MPD) stent placement.
16377317.eligibility: Patients with chronic pancreatitis who have undergone main pancreatic duct (MPD) stent placement are eligible.
16377317.interpretation:
- Score <= 5: Lower risk of major stent occlusion within 90 days.
- Score > 5: Higher risk of major stent occlusion within 90 days. Stent removal or exchange should be considered within 3 months.
16377317.utility: The study found a significant association between a score sum > 5 and a higher risk of major stent occlusion within 90 days.

16396767.title: Myelofibrosis Prognostic Score Calculator
16396767.code:
def compute_risk_score(age, hemoglobin_level):
    """
    Compute the risk score for a patient with myelofibrosis based on age and hemoglobin level.

    Parameters:
    age (int): The age of the patient in years.
    hemoglobin_level (float): The hemoglobin level of the patient in g/dl.

    Returns:
    int: The risk score of the patient.
    """
    risk_score = 0
    if age > 60:
        risk_score += 1
    if hemoglobin_level < 10:
        risk_score += 1
    return risk_score
16396767.purpose: This calculator is used to predict the prognosis of patients with myelofibrosis based on age and hemoglobin level.
16396767.eligibility: Patients diagnosed with myelofibrosis are eligible for this calculator.
16396767.interpretation:
- 0 points: Low risk group with better prognosis.
- 1 point: Intermediate risk group.
- 2 points: High risk group with poor prognosis.
16396767.utility: The overall model and the difference between each of the subgroups were statistically significant in a training group, a test group, the overall cohort of patients and the group of patients with chronic idiopathic myelofibrosis.

16398654.title: TTP/HUS Response to Plasma Exchange Predictor
16398654.code:
def compute_risk_score(age, haemoglobin, fever):
    """
    Compute the risk score for a patient with TTP/HUS undergoing plasma exchange.

    Parameters:
    age (int): The age of the patient in years.
    haemoglobin (float): The haemoglobin level of the patient in g/dl.
    fever (bool): Whether the patient has a fever at presentation.

    Returns:
    int: The risk score for the patient.
    """
    score = 0
    if age > 40:
        score += 2
    if haemoglobin < 9.0:
        score += 2
    if fever:
        score += 2
    return score
16398654.purpose: This calculator is used to predict the 6-month mortality rate of patients with thrombotic thrombocytopenic purpura/haemolytic uraemic syndrome (TTP/HUS) undergoing plasma exchange.
16398654.eligibility: Patients diagnosed with thrombotic thrombocytopenic purpura/haemolytic uraemic syndrome (TTP/HUS) who are undergoing plasma exchange are eligible.
16398654.interpretation:
- Score 0: 12.5% 6-month mortality rate
- Score 2: 14.0% 6-month mortality rate
- Score 4: 31.3% 6-month mortality rate
- Score 6: 61.5% 6-month mortality rate
16398654.utility: This model predicted 13.4% of outcome variance.

16442906.title: Early Mortality Risk Score After ICD Implantation
16442906.code:
def compute_risk_score(age, atrial_fibrillation, creatinine, nyha_class):
    """
    Compute the risk score based on the patient's age, history of atrial fibrillation, creatinine level, and NYHA class.

    Parameters:
    age (int): Patient's age
    atrial_fibrillation (bool): Whether the patient has a history of atrial fibrillation
    creatinine (float): Patient's creatinine level
    nyha_class (int): Patient's New York Heart Association class

    Returns:
    int: The computed risk score
    """
    score = 0
    if age > 80:
        score += 1
    if atrial_fibrillation:
        score += 1
    if creatinine > 1.8:
        score += 1
    if nyha_class in [3, 4]:
        score += 1
    return score
16442906.purpose: This calculator is used to predict the mortality within the first year after Implantable Cardioverter Defibrillators (ICD) implantation.
16442906.eligibility: Patients who have undergone ICD implantation are eligible.
16442906.interpretation:
- 0 points: 3.4% mortality
- 1 point: 4.3% mortality
- 2 points: 17% mortality
- 3 or more points: 33% mortality
16442906.utility: A risk score >= 2 predicted a 1-year mortality rate of 21%, whereas a risk score < 2 predicted a mortality rate of 4% at 1 year.

16478676.title: Liver Cirrhosis Risk Calculator for Chronic Hepatitis C Patients
16478676.code:
def compute_risk_score(albumin, platelet_count, alkaline_phosphatase, ast, alt):
    """
    Compute the risk score for liver cirrhosis in CHC patients.

    Parameters:
    albumin (float): Albumin level in g/L.
    platelet_count (float): Platelet count in 10^9/L.
    alkaline_phosphatase (float): Alkaline phosphatase level in IU/L.
    ast (float): AST level.
    alt (float): ALT level.

    Returns:
    float: The computed risk score.
    """
    ast_alt_ratio = ast / alt
    score = (albumin * 0.3 + platelet_count * 0.05) - (alkaline_phosphatase * 0.014 + ast_alt_ratio * 6 + 14)
    return score
16478676.purpose: This calculator is used to predict the risk of severe fibrosis and/or liver cirrhosis in patients with chronic hepatitis C (CHC) based on four routine laboratory blood tests.
16478676.eligibility: Patients with clinically confirmed Chronic Hepatitis C are eligible for this calculator.
16478676.interpretation:
- Score < 0: The patient is likely to have liver cirrhosis.
- Score >= 0: The patient is likely to have CHC without cirrhosis.
16478676.utility: The MDA function correctly classified 98% of the cirrhotic patients with a specificity of 97%, a positive predictive value of 99%, and a negative predictive value of 92%.

16480439.title: Emergency Room Transfusion Score (ETS)
16480439.code:
def calculate_ets(sbp, ultrasound, fracture, age, scene, accident, fall):
    """
    Calculate the Emergency Room Transfusion Score (ETS).
    
    Parameters:
    sbp (int): Systolic blood pressure
    ultrasound (bool): Presence of free fluid in abdominal ultrasound
    fracture (bool): Presence of clinically unstable pelvic ring fracture
    age (int): Age of the patient
    scene (bool): Whether the patient was admitted from the scene
    accident (bool): Whether the trauma was due to a traffic accident
    fall (bool): Whether the trauma was due to a fall from >3 m
    
    Returns:
    float: The ETS score
    """
    score = 0
    if sbp < 90:
        score += 2.5
    elif sbp < 120:
        score += 1.5
    if ultrasound:
        score += 2.0
    if fracture:
        score += 1.5
    if age > 60:
        score += 1.5
    elif age > 20:
        score += 0.5
    if scene:
        score += 1.0
    if accident:
        score += 1.0
    if fall:
        score += 1.0
    return score
16480439.purpose: This calculator is used to predict the need for red blood cell transfusion in the early care of trauma patients.
16480439.eligibility: All trauma patients admitted to the institution who needed trauma team activation.
16480439.interpretation:
- 1 point: 0.7% probability of needing a transfusion
- 3 points: 5% probability of needing a transfusion
- 9.5 points: 97% probability of needing a transfusion
16480439.utility: The ETS has a high predictive power for the need of blood transfusion in trauma patients. It can help identify patients in need for immediate red blood cell substitution and avoid unnecessary costs for patients not in need of urgent transfusion.

16488713.title: Postrecurrence Survival Risk Calculator for Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer (NSCLC) Patients
16488713.code:
def compute_risk_score(performance_status, symptoms, liver_recurrence, initial_stage, multiple_recurrences):
    """
    Compute the risk score for postrecurrence survival in NSCLC patients.

    Parameters:
    performance_status (int): Performance status at recurrence (1, 2, 3, or 4)
    symptoms (bool): Whether the patient has symptoms at recurrence (True or False)
    liver_recurrence (bool): Whether the patient has liver recurrence (True or False)
    initial_stage (str): Initial lung cancer stage ('IIB' or 'worse')
    multiple_recurrences (bool): Whether the patient has multiple recurrences (True or False)

    Returns:
    float: The risk score
    """
    score = 0
    if performance_status == 1:
        score += 1.5
    elif performance_status == 2:
        score += 2.8
    elif performance_status in [3, 4]:
        score += 4.2

    if symptoms:
        score += 3.6

    if liver_recurrence:
        score += 2.3

    if initial_stage in ['IIB', 'worse']:
        score += 1.8

    if multiple_recurrences:
        score += 1.0

    return score
16488713.purpose: This calculator is used to estimate the risk of mortality after recurrence in patients who have undergone complete resection of NSCLC.
16488713.eligibility: Patients who have undergone complete resection of NSCLC and subsequently had recurrent cancer are eligible.
16488713.interpretation:
- Low risk: 4.0 or fewer total points, with 12-month survival of 75%
- Moderate-low risk: 4.1 to 6.1 points, with 12-month survival of 51%
- Moderate-high risk: 6.1 to 8.0 points, with 12-month survival of 25%
- High risk: more than 8.0 points, with 12-month survival of 9%
16488713.utility: The risk score was significantly different across groups (p < 0.01), indicating its potential clinical value in predicting postrecurrence survival in NSCLC patients.

16490475.title: MRSA Carriage Risk Score Calculator
16490475.code:
def calculate_risk_score(sex, age, fluoroquinolones, cephalosporins, carbapenems, hospitalization, iv_therapy, catheter, transfer):
    """
    Calculate the MRSA Carriage Risk Score.

    Parameters:
    sex (bool): True if male, False if female
    age (int): Age of the patient
    fluoroquinolones (bool): True if received fluoroquinolones in the last 6 months, False otherwise
    cephalosporins (bool): True if received cephalosporins in the last 6 months, False otherwise
    carbapenems (bool): True if received carbapenems in the last 6 months, False otherwise
    hospitalization (bool): True if hospitalized in the last 12 months, False otherwise
    iv_therapy (bool): True if received intravenous therapy in the last 12 months, False otherwise
    catheter (bool): True if has urinary catheter at admission, False otherwise
    transfer (bool): True if transferred within the hospital, False otherwise

    Returns:
    float: MRSA Carriage Risk Score
    """
    score = 0
    if sex:
        score += 1.9
    if age > 75:
        score += 2.0
    if fluoroquinolones:
        score += 2.7
    if cephalosporins:
        score += 2.1
    if carbapenems:
        score += 3.2
    if hospitalization:
        score += 1.9
    if iv_therapy:
        score += 1.7
    if catheter:
        score += 2.0
    if transfer:
        score += 2.4
    return score
16490475.purpose: This calculator is used to evaluate the probability of previously unknown carriage of methicillin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus (MRSA) at hospital admission.
16490475.eligibility: Adult inpatients admitted to a hospital.
16490475.interpretation:
- Score <= 1: Low risk, 8% probability of MRSA carriage
- Score 2-4: Intermediate risk, 19% probability of MRSA carriage
- Score >= 5: High risk, 46% probability of MRSA carriage
16490475.utility: The risk score has good discrimination (c-statistic, 0.73) and showed excellent calibration (P = .88).

16504638.title: HEMORR2HAGES Risk Score for Major Bleeding
16504638.code:
def calculate_hemorr2hages_score(prior_bleed, hepatic_or_renal_disease, ethanol_abuse, malignancy, age, reduced_platelet_count_or_function, uncontrolled_hypertension, anemia, genetic_factors, excessive_fall_risk, stroke):
    """
    Calculate HEMORR2HAGES score.

    Parameters:
    prior_bleed (bool): True if the patient has a history of bleeding, False otherwise.
    hepatic_or_renal_disease (bool): True if the patient has hepatic or renal disease, False otherwise.
    ethanol_abuse (bool): True if the patient abuses ethanol, False otherwise.
    malignancy (bool): True if the patient has malignancy, False otherwise.
    age (int): Age of the patient.
    reduced_platelet_count_or_function (bool): True if the patient has reduced platelet count or function, False otherwise.
    uncontrolled_hypertension (bool): True if the patient has uncontrolled hypertension, False otherwise.
    anemia (bool): True if the patient has anemia, False otherwise.
    genetic_factors (bool): True if the patient has genetic factors that increase bleeding risk, False otherwise.
    excessive_fall_risk (bool): True if the patient has an excessive risk of falling, False otherwise.
    stroke (bool): True if the patient has had a stroke, False otherwise.

    Returns:
    int: HEMORR2HAGES score.
    """
    score = 0
    if prior_bleed:
        score += 2
    if hepatic_or_renal_disease:
        score += 1
    if ethanol_abuse:
        score += 1
    if malignancy:
        score += 1
    if age > 75:
        score += 1
    if reduced_platelet_count_or_function:
        score += 1
    if uncontrolled_hypertension:
        score += 1
    if anemia:
        score += 1
    if genetic_factors:
        score += 1
    if excessive_fall_risk:
        score += 1
    if stroke:
        score += 1
    return score
16504638.purpose: This calculator is used to quantify the risk of hemorrhage in elderly patients with atrial fibrillation, especially when considering the prescription of antithrombotic therapy.
16504638.eligibility: Elderly patients (age > 75 years) with atrial fibrillation are eligible for this risk score calculation.
16504638.interpretation:
- Score 0: 1.9 bleeding events per 100 patient-years
- Score 1: 2.5 bleeding events per 100 patient-years
- Score 2: 5.3 bleeding events per 100 patient-years
- Score 3: 8.4 bleeding events per 100 patient-years
- Score 4: 10.4 bleeding events per 100 patient-years
- Score >=5: 12.3 bleeding events per 100 patient-years
16504638.utility: The HEMORR2HAGES score had a greater predictive accuracy (c statistic 0.67) than other bleed prediction schemes (P < .001).

16505659.title: Candida Score Calculator
16505659.code:
def compute_candida_score(surgery, multifocal_colonization, total_parenteral_nutrition, severe_sepsis):
    """
    Compute the Candida Score based on the presence of four factors.

    Parameters:
    surgery (bool): Whether the patient had surgery.
    multifocal_colonization (bool): Whether the patient has multifocal Candida colonization.
    total_parenteral_nutrition (bool): Whether the patient is on total parenteral nutrition.
    severe_sepsis (bool): Whether the patient has severe sepsis.

    Returns:
    float: The Candida Score.
    """
    score = 0
    if surgery:
        score += 0.997
    if multifocal_colonization:
        score += 1.112
    if total_parenteral_nutrition:
        score += 0.908
    if severe_sepsis:
        score += 2.038
    return score
16505659.purpose: This calculator is used to decide early antifungal treatment when candidal infection is suspected in nonneutropenic critically ill patients.
16505659.eligibility: Nonneutropenic critically ill patients aged 18 years and older admitted to the ICU for at least 7 days are eligible.
16505659.interpretation:
- A Candida Score of less than or equal to 2.5 indicates a lower risk of proven candidal infection.
- A Candida Score of more than 2.5 indicates a higher risk of proven candidal infection and suggests that the patient may benefit from early antifungal treatment.
16505659.utility: The Candida Score has a sensitivity of 81% and a specificity of 74% for predicting proven candidal infection.

16525500.title: Fatal Intracranial Hemorrhage Risk Score in Acute Leukemia
16525500.code:
def calculate_risk_score(gender, leukemia_type, leukocytosis, thrombocytopenia, prothrombin_time):
    """
    Calculate the risk score for fatal intracranial hemorrhage in acute leukemia patients.

    Parameters:
    gender (str): 'male' or 'female'
    leukemia_type (str): 'acute promyelocytic leukemia' or 'other'
    leukocytosis (bool): True if the patient has leukocytosis, False otherwise
    thrombocytopenia (bool): True if the patient has thrombocytopenia, False otherwise
    prothrombin_time (bool): True if the patient has prolonged prothrombin time, False otherwise

    Returns:
    int: The risk score, ranging from 0 to 5
    """
    score = 0
    if gender == 'female':
        score += 1
    if leukemia_type == 'acute promyelocytic leukemia':
        score += 1
    if leukocytosis:
        score += 1
    if thrombocytopenia:
        score += 1
    if prothrombin_time:
        score += 1
    return score
16525500.purpose: This calculator is used to predict the risk of fatal intracranial hemorrhage (FICH) in patients with acute leukemia.
16525500.eligibility: Patients newly diagnosed with acute leukemia are eligible for this risk score calculation.
16525500.interpretation:
- Risk Score 0 or 1: Low-risk group (LRG) for FICH
- Risk Score 2 or 3: Intermediate-risk group (IRG) for FICH
- Risk Score 4 or 5: High-risk group (HRG) for FICH
16525500.utility: The risk score model showed a strong correlation with the occurrence of FICH (all P-values < 0.001). Overall survival was significantly shorter in the high-risk group compared with the low-risk group.

16627198.title: Bladder Rupture Risk Calculator in Blunt Trauma Patients with Pelvic Fracture
16627198.code:
def compute_risk_score(diastasis, fracture):
    """
    Compute the risk score for bladder rupture.

    Args:
    diastasis (bool): True if diastasis of the pubic symphysis >1 cm, False otherwise.
    fracture (bool): True if fracture of the obturator ring with displacement >1 cm, False otherwise.

    Returns:
    int: The risk score, ranging from 0 to 2.
    """
    return int(diastasis) + int(fracture)
16627198.purpose: This calculator is used to predict the risk of bladder rupture in blunt trauma patients with pelvic fractures based on the location and displacement of pelvic fractures and the degree of hematuria.
16627198.eligibility: Patients with blunt trauma pelvic fractures and hematuria >30 red blood cells per high-powered field (RBC/HPF) are eligible.
16627198.interpretation:
- Score 0: 2.3% probability of bladder injury
- Score 1: 9.2% probability of bladder injury
- Score 2: 43.7% probability of bladder injury
16627198.utility: The clinical utility of this risk score is yet to be validated. However, it has the potential to guide the care of the blunt trauma patient.

16632717.title: Mastora Score for Pulmonary Embolism Severity
16632717.code:
def compute_mastora_score(pe_severity):
    """
    Compute the Mastora score for a patient with pulmonary embolism.

    Args:
    pe_severity (float): The severity of pulmonary embolism assessed by MDCT, expressed as a percentage.

    Returns:
    float: The Mastora score.
    """
    return pe_severity
16632717.purpose: This calculator is used to predict cor pulmonale and short-term outcome in patients with pulmonary embolism (PE) based on the severity of PE assessed by MDCT.
16632717.eligibility: Patients diagnosed with acute pulmonary embolism (PE) using MDCT are eligible.
16632717.interpretation:
- Score < 21.3%: Low risk of cor pulmonale and early death. Negative predictive value for cor pulmonale is 0.87 and for early death is 0.96.
- Score >= 21.3%: High risk of cor pulmonale and early death. Positive predictive value for cor pulmonale is 1 and for early death is 0.24.
16632717.utility: The Mastora score showed a significant correlation with pulmonary artery pressures (r = 0.69; p < 0.0016) and the presence of cor pulmonale (p = 0.0051). It was also a significant predictor of early death (p = 0.018).

16644622.title: LADA Clinical Risk Score Calculator
16644622.code:
def compute_lada_risk_score(age, symptoms, bmi, personal_history, family_history):
    """
    Compute the LADA Clinical Risk Score.

    Parameters:
    age (int): Age of onset
    symptoms (bool): Presence of acute symptoms of hyperglycemia
    bmi (float): Body Mass Index
    personal_history (bool): Personal history of autoimmune disease
    family_history (bool): Family history of autoimmune disease

    Returns:
    int: LADA Clinical Risk Score
    """
    score = 0
    if age < 50: score += 1
    if symptoms: score += 1
    if bmi < 25: score += 1
    if personal_history: score += 1
    if family_history: score += 1
    return score
16644622.purpose: This calculator is used to identify adults at high risk of Latent Autoimmune Diabetes in Adults (LADA) who require islet antibody testing.
16644622.eligibility: Adults aged between 30-75 years with newly diagnosed diabetes are eligible.
16644622.interpretation:
- Score < 2: Low risk of LADA, with a negative predictive value of 99%.
- Score >= 2: High risk of LADA, with a sensitivity of 90% and specificity of 71%.
16644622.utility: The LADA Clinical Risk Score has a sensitivity of 90% and specificity of 71% for identifying LADA in adults with newly diagnosed diabetes.

16679162.title: AIDS-Associated Kaposi's Sarcoma Prognostic Index
16679162.code:
def compute_prognostic_score(is_ks_defining, cd4_count, age, has_other_illness):
    """
    Compute the prognostic score for a patient with AIDS-associated Kaposi's sarcoma.

    Parameters:
    is_ks_defining (bool): Whether Kaposi's sarcoma is the AIDS-defining illness.
    cd4_count (int): The CD4 count of the patient.
    age (int): The age of the patient.
    has_other_illness (bool): Whether the patient has another AIDS-associated illness.

    Returns:
    int: The prognostic score.
    """
    score = 10
    if is_ks_defining:
        score -= 3
    score -= cd4_count // 100
    if age >= 50:
        score += 2
    if has_other_illness:
        score += 3
    return score
16679162.purpose: This calculator is used to predict the mortality risk of patients diagnosed with AIDS-associated Kaposi's sarcoma based on clinical characteristics present at the time of diagnosis.
16679162.eligibility: Patients diagnosed with AIDS-associated Kaposi's sarcoma are eligible.
16679162.interpretation:
- Score 0: 1-year survival probability is 0.993, 5-year survival probability is 0.984
- Score 5: 1-year survival probability is 0.967, 5-year survival probability is 0.918
- Score 10: 1-year survival probability is 0.834, 5-year survival probability is 0.631
- Score 15: 1-year survival probability is 0.378, 5-year survival probability is 0.084
16679162.utility: The index had a concordance of 76.8% (71.7-82.3). Increasing the prognostic score by 1 increased the 1-year death hazard ratio by 40% (95% CI 28-53%; bootstrapped hazard ratio 1.39, 1.25-1.51).

16690897.title: Brain Arteriovenous Malformation Surgery Outcome Prediction Model
16690897.code:
def compute_risk_score(brain_eloquence, diffuse_nidus, deep_venous_drainage):
    """
    Compute the risk score for neurological outcome after bAVM surgery.

    Parameters:
    brain_eloquence (bool): True if the brain is eloquent, False otherwise.
    diffuse_nidus (bool): True if the nidus is diffuse, False otherwise.
    deep_venous_drainage (bool): True if there is deep venous drainage, False otherwise.

    Returns:
    int: The risk score.
    """
    score = 0
    if brain_eloquence:
        score += 4
    if diffuse_nidus:
        score += 3
    if deep_venous_drainage:
        score += 2
    return score
16690897.purpose: This calculator is used to predict the neurological outcome for patients undergoing surgery of brain arteriovenous malformations (bAVM).
16690897.eligibility: Patients who are undergoing surgery for brain arteriovenous malformations (bAVM) are eligible.
16690897.interpretation:
- Score 0 to 2: 1.8% probability of early disabling neurological deficits, 1.8% probability of permanently disabling outcomes.
- Score 3 to 5: 17.4% probability of early disabling neurological deficits, 4.4% probability of permanently disabling outcomes.
- Score 6 to 7: 31.6% probability of early disabling neurological deficits, 18.4% probability of permanently disabling outcomes.
- Score >7: 52.9% probability of early disabling neurological deficits, 32.4% probability of permanently disabling outcomes.
16690897.utility: The discrimination of the model was 0.80 with 2.8% optimism. Validation in the second patient cohort revealed good performance at risk stratification.

16697729.title: MELD-Na Calculator
16697729.code:
def calculate_meld_na(meld, na):
    """
    Calculate the MELD-Na score.

    Parameters:
    meld (float): The MELD score.
    na (float): The serum sodium concentration in mEq/L. Should be between 120 and 135.

    Returns:
    float: The MELD-Na score.
    """
    if na < 120:
        na = 120
    elif na > 135:
        na = 135
    meld_na = meld + 1.59 * (135 - na)
    return meld_na
16697729.purpose: This calculator is used to predict the mortality risk in patients with end-stage liver disease awaiting liver transplantation.
16697729.eligibility: Patients with end-stage liver disease who are candidates for liver transplantation are eligible.
16697729.interpretation:
- MELD-Na scores of 20 are associated with a 6% risk of death within 6 months of listing.
- MELD-Na scores of 30 are associated with a 16% risk of death within 6 months of listing.
- MELD-Na scores of 40 are associated with a 37% risk of death within 6 months of listing.
16697729.utility: The MELD-Na score provides a more accurate survival prediction than the MELD score alone. If this new score were used to allocate grafts, it would affect 27% of the transplant recipients.

16708358.title: Modified Model for End-Stage Liver Disease-based Japan Integrated Scoring (MELD-JIS) System
16708358.code:
def compute_meld_jis(meld_score):
    """
    Compute the MELD-JIS score based on the MELD score.

    Args:
    meld_score (int): The MELD score of the patient.

    Returns:
    int: The MELD-JIS score.
    """
    if meld_score < 10:
        return 0
    elif 10 <= meld_score <= 14:
        return 1
    else:
        return 2
16708358.purpose: This calculator is used to predict the outcome for patients with hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC) undergoing locoregional therapy.
16708358.eligibility: Patients with hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC) who are undergoing locoregional therapy are eligible.
16708358.interpretation:
- Score 0: MELD score <10, lower risk
- Score 1: MELD score 10-14, moderate risk
- Score 2: MELD score >14, higher risk
16708358.utility: The area under receiver operating characteristic curve (AUC) for the modified JIS system was 0.804 at 12 months and 0.853 at 24 months, indicating a good predictive ability.

16720680.title: 21-Gene Recurrence Score Assay for Breast Cancer
16720680.code:
def compute_risk_score(RS):
    """
    Compute the risk category based on the 21-gene recurrence score (RS).

    Args:
    RS (int): The 21-gene recurrence score.

    Returns:
    str: The risk category ('low', 'intermediate', 'high').
    """
    if RS < 18:
        return 'low'
    elif RS < 31:
        return 'intermediate'
    else:
        return 'high'
16720680.purpose: This calculator is used to quantify the likelihood of distant recurrence in women with estrogen receptor-positive, lymph node-negative breast cancer treated with adjuvant tamoxifen, and to predict the magnitude of chemotherapy benefit.
16720680.eligibility: Women with estrogen receptor-positive, lymph node-negative breast cancer who are treated with adjuvant tamoxifen.
16720680.interpretation:
- Low risk (RS < 18): Patients derive minimal, if any, benefit from chemotherapy treatment. The absolute decrease in distant recurrence rate at 10 years is -1.1%.
- Intermediate risk (18 ≤ RS < 31): Patients do not appear to have a large benefit from chemotherapy, but the uncertainty in the estimate cannot exclude a clinically important benefit.
- High risk (RS ≥ 31): Patients have a large benefit from chemotherapy. The absolute decrease in 10-year distant recurrence rate is 27.6%.
16720680.utility: The test for interaction between chemotherapy treatment and RS was statistically significant (P = .038), indicating that the RS assay is useful in predicting the magnitude of chemotherapy benefit.

16729309.title: FIB-4 Index for Liver Fibrosis
16729309.code:
import math

def compute_fib4(age, ast, plt, alt):
    """
    Compute the FIB-4 index for liver fibrosis.

    Parameters:
    age (int): Age of the patient in years
    ast (float): AST level in U/L
    plt (float): Platelet count in 10(9)/L
    alt (float): ALT level in U/L

    Returns:
    float: FIB-4 index
    """
    fib4 = (age * ast) / (plt * math.sqrt(alt))
    return fib4
16729309.purpose: This calculator is used to predict significant liver fibrosis in patients with HIV/HCV coinfection, potentially reducing the need for liver biopsy.
16729309.eligibility: Patients with HIV/HCV coinfection are eligible for this calculator.
16729309.interpretation:
- FIB-4 < 1.45: The negative predictive value to exclude advanced fibrosis (stage 4-6) is 90% with a sensitivity of 70%.
- 1.45 <= FIB-4 <= 3.25: Intermediate risk, consider further testing.
- FIB-4 > 3.25: The positive predictive value for advanced fibrosis is 65% with a specificity of 97%.
16729309.utility: The AUROC of the index was 0.765 for differentiation between Ishak stage 0-3 and 4-6. Using the cutoffs of 1.45 and 3.25, 87% of the patients with FIB-4 values outside this range would be correctly classified, and liver biopsy could be avoided in 71% of the validation group.

16754628.title: Urinary T-bet Expression Lupus Flare Risk Calculator
16754628.code:
def compute_risk_score(t_bet_expression):
    """
    Compute the risk score based on the urinary T-bet mRNA expression.

    Args:
    t_bet_expression (float): The urinary T-bet mRNA expression level.

    Returns:
    float: The computed risk score.
    """
    all_lupus_flare_risk = 8.4 * t_bet_expression
    severe_flare_risk = 12.9 * t_bet_expression
    return all_lupus_flare_risk, severe_flare_risk
16754628.purpose: This calculator is used to predict the risk of lupus flare in patients with Systemic Lupus Erythematosus (SLE) based on the urinary T-bet mRNA expression.
16754628.eligibility: Patients with clinically quiescent Systemic Lupus Erythematosus (SLE) are eligible.
16754628.interpretation:
- A urinary T-bet expression three times above the average level of healthy control predicts all lupus flare with 64.3% sensitivity and 84.4% specificity.
- Patients with a high urinary T-bet expression have a significantly higher risk of all lupus flare and severe flare than the patients with a low T-bet expression.
16754628.utility: The urinary T-bet expression was an independent predictor of lupus flare with a sensitivity of 64.3% and specificity of 84.4% for predicting all lupus flare.

16776373.title: Radiosurgery-based AVM Score Calculator
16776373.code:
